docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARVEY, JAMESON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUCCERA, MIRK $1,224.26 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,284.26, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2448.52 AND ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO DEFENDANT. THE RESULTING JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL HELD 8/6/08 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON AUGUST 6, 2008 BY JUDGE DIANE ELAN WICK, CLERK KARISSA SHAW, NOT REPORTED. (611)

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY MIRK KUCCERA IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: $250 OR MORE ON THE 19TH OF EVERY MONTH, COMMENCING ON DECEMBER 19, 2008. COMMISSIONER:PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) N0 APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.

Off Calendar Aug-06-2008 Set For Trial On Aug-06-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 611

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-06-2008 Continued To Aug-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-06-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Elan Wick, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (611)

APPEARANCES:
Attorney Christopher Miller appearing on behalf of the plaintiff.
Plaintiff/Respondent Jameson Garvey is also present.
Plaintiff's/Respondent's witnesses Jennie Smith, Steffan Franz Lippman, and Peter Tarne are present.

Defendant/Appellant Mirk Kuccera is present In Propria Persona.
Defendant's/Appellant's witness Adela Kuccera is present.

This matter comes on calendar for a Trial De Novo. All parties and witnesses are affirmed. The hears testimony from both parties and all witnesses. Both sides give brief closing arguments.

The court takes this matter under submission.

8/6/08 - JUDGMENT ENTERED

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-21-2008 Judgment Entered
